title: Common Parameters
description: Parameters shared across most MCP tools (authentication, retry, subscription, resource-group). Optional common parameters are filtered from per-tool documentation tables; required ones are kept.

name.description: CLI parameter name including leading dashes (e.g. '--tenant').

type.description: JSON-Schema-style type of the parameter value.

isRequired.description: Whether the parameter is required. Common parameters are usually optional (false).
